items.desc: Worked on Go-based microservices in sales-channel-service with Kafka, SQS, and PostgreSQL. Integrated sales channel APIs and refactored WooCommerce flows for reliability. Debugged critical production issues via logs and DLQ analysis. Improved maintainability with refactoring and Redis caching, and actively contributed through PRs and code reviews.

Working on development, maintenance, and optimization of LushLeaf's website, improving performance, UX, and mobile responsiveness. Collaborating with marketing to ship campaign pages and contributing frontend/backend tasks based on project needs.

Designed and developed landing pages, created a CRM dashboard, and revamped the resources page with chatbot integration. Built prototypes and microservices including LLM parsers, a markdown parser, meeting summarizer, and snapshot creator while exploring Zapier integrations.

Modernised a responsive website using React JS, increasing user engagement by 20%. • Arranged interactive React elements with Lottie animations, achieving a 30% increase in user interaction and boosting session duration by 20% across the platform • Innovated design solutions and assisted in project management, leading to a 45% improvement in project completion time and Explored GitHub collaboration methods, enhancing team productivity by 80%
Doing Projects to Improve My Skills
Built three Projects and Deployed then Github Pages
Handing Bidding, Human Resource, Finance, Accounting, & Other Day to Day Managing Work
In this Start-up, I Managed HR, Accounts, Project, Finance, Tendering, Public Relation, Taxation Management.It gave me an opportunity to work in a collaborative team environment.

As an Admin Intern, I gained valuable hands-on experience in Business Managements. During my tenure, I contributed to the Overall Handling of Various Departments and Co-ordination Between Departments and Digitalization of Work/ Processes
